tests.name: sniffFormat — every magic byte is load-bearing rejects a PNG with signature byte 0 corrupted

sniffFormat — every magic byte is load-bearing rejects a PNG with signature byte 2 corrupted
sniffFormat — every magic byte is load-bearing rejects a PNG with signature byte 3 corrupted
sniffFormat — every magic byte is load-bearing rejects a PNG with signature byte 4 corrupted
sniffFormat — every magic byte is load-bearing rejects a PNG with signature byte 5 corrupted
sniffFormat — every magic byte is load-bearing rejects a PNG with signature byte 6 corrupted
sniffFormat — every magic byte is load-bearing rejects a PNG with signature byte 7 corrupted
sniffFormat — every magic byte is load-bearing rejects a JPEG with signature byte 0 corrupted
sniffFormat — every magic byte is load-bearing rejects a JPEG with signature byte 1 corrupted
sniffFormat — every magic byte is load-bearing rejects a JPEG with signature byte 2 corrupted
sniffFormat — every magic byte is load-bearing rejects a WebP with signature byte 0 corrupted
sniffFormat — every magic byte is load-bearing rejects a WebP with signature byte 1 corrupted
sniffFormat — every magic byte is load-bearing rejects a WebP with signature byte 2 corrupted
sniffFormat — every magic byte is load-bearing rejects a WebP with signature byte 3 corrupted

sniffFormat — length boundary is exact (kills >= -> > and EqualityOperator) accepts a PNG signature at exactly the 8-byte minimum
sniffFormat — length boundary is exact (kills >= -> > and EqualityOperator) rejects a 7-byte PNG signature (one below the minimum)
sniffFormat — length boundary is exact (kills >= -> > and EqualityOperator) accepts a JPEG signature at exactly 3 bytes and rejects at 2
sniffFormat — length boundary is exact (kills >= -> > and EqualityOperator) accepts a WebP signature at exactly 12 bytes and rejects at 11
PNG dimension parsing — exact arithmetic and bounds (kills readU32BE mutants) decodes a width above 0xFFFFFF so the *0x1000000 term is required
PNG dimension parsing — exact arithmetic and bounds (kills readU32BE mutants) rejects a PNG truncated to exactly 23 bytes (one below the 24-byte minimum)
PNG dimension parsing — exact arithmetic and bounds (kills readU32BE mutants) rejects each individual IHDR tag byte being corrupted
PNG dimension parsing — exact arithmetic and bounds (kills readU32BE mutants) rejects a zero width but accepts width 1 (boundary of the === 0 guard)
PNG dimension parsing — exact arithmetic and bounds (kills readU32BE mutants) rejects a zero height but accepts height 1
JPEG dimension parsing — marker walk boundaries rejects when the first marker byte is not 0xFF
JPEG dimension parsing — marker walk boundaries rejects a JPEG whose declared segment length is exactly 1 (< 2 guard)
JPEG dimension parsing — marker walk boundaries treats a marker just past the RST range (0xD8) as standalone, not a length segment
JPEG dimension parsing — marker walk boundaries rejects a SOF frame whose width is zero
JPEG dimension parsing — marker walk boundaries rejects a SOF frame whose height is zero
WebP sub-format parsing — boundaries and fourcc bytes rejects a WebP shorter than the 16-byte fourcc minimum
WebP sub-format parsing — boundaries and fourcc bytes rejects a VP8 whose key-frame header is truncated to 29 bytes (< 30 guard)
WebP sub-format parsing — boundaries and fourcc bytes rejects each corrupted "VP8 " fourcc byte
WebP sub-format parsing — boundaries and fourcc bytes rejects a VP8 with zero width or zero height
WebP sub-format parsing — boundaries and fourcc bytes parses VP8L and rejects when its 0x2f signature byte is wrong
WebP sub-format parsing — boundaries and fourcc bytes rejects a VP8L truncated to 24 bytes (one below the 25-byte minimum)
WebP sub-format parsing — boundaries and fourcc bytes parses VP8X and recovers the +1 canvas size exactly
WebP sub-format parsing — boundaries and fourcc bytes rejects each corrupted "VP8X" fourcc byte (15th byte distinguishes X from L)
fail-closed sizing returns the full-window retry (kills <= 0 -> < 0) a zero per-shopper cap denies with retryAfterMs exactly WINDOW_MS
fail-closed sizing returns the full-window retry (kills <= 0 -> < 0) a zero per-tenant cap denies with retryAfterMs exactly WINDOW_MS
retryAfterMs is the exact time until the oldest hit leaves the window after filling the shopper bucket at t=0, the N+1th denial waits the full window
retryAfterMs is the exact time until the oldest hit leaves the window the retry shrinks by exactly the elapsed time (kills the +/- arithmetic mutant)
retryAfterMs is the exact time until the oldest hit leaves the window uses the OLDEST in-window hit, not the newest (kills Math.min/Math.max swap)
retryAfterMs is the exact time until the oldest hit leaves the window takes the MAX wait across the two binding buckets (kills wait > retry boundary)
retryAfterMs is the exact time until the oldest hit leaves the window a brand-new key allows its first request (kills a non-empty get() default)
retryAfterMs is the exact time until the oldest hit leaves the window computes the exact retry when only the shopper bucket is the binding cap
retryAfterMs is the exact time until the oldest hit leaves the window never returns a non-positive retry — floored at 1 (kills Math.max -> Math.min)
sniffFormat identifies each real format from its magic bytes
sniffFormat returns null for unrecognised or too-short buffers
sniffFormat does not confuse a RIFF container that is not WEBP
parseDimensions round-trip recovers exact PNG dimensions
parseDimensions round-trip recovers exact JPEG dimensions
parseDimensions round-trip recovers exact WebP (VP8) dimensions
parseDimensions round-trip property: PNG width/height survive a round-trip for arbitrary in-range sizes
parseDimensions fail-closed rejects a truncated PNG IHDR
parseDimensions fail-closed rejects a PNG whose first chunk is not IHDR
parseDimensions fail-closed rejects a zero-dimension PNG
parseDimensions fail-closed rejects a JPEG with no SOF marker
parseDimensions fail-closed rejects a JPEG with a corrupt segment length
parseDimensions fail-closed skips standalone JPEG markers then finds the SOF
parseDimensions fail-closed skips a non-SOF segment (APP0) before reaching the SOF frame
parseDimensions fail-closed rejects a truncated WebP VP8 header
parseDimensions fail-closed rejects a WebP with an unknown sub-chunk
WebP VP8L and VP8X sub-formats parses a VP8L lossless header
WebP VP8L and VP8X sub-formats parses a VP8X extended header
WebP VP8L and VP8X sub-formats rejects a VP8L with a missing signature byte
valid samples accepted accepts a valid PNG/JPEG/WebP and reports the sniffed format + dimensions
valid samples accepted accepts when no MIME is declared (sniff-only path)
MIME / extension spoofing rejected rejects PNG-declared bytes that are actually JPEG
MIME / extension spoofing rejected rejects JPEG-declared bytes that are actually PNG
byte-size boundary accepts a payload exactly at maxBytes
byte-size boundary rejects a payload one byte over maxBytes (fail-closed before parse)
dimension boundary (dimension-bomb defence) accepts dimensions exactly at the cap
dimension boundary (dimension-bomb defence) rejects width one over the cap
dimension boundary (dimension-bomb defence) rejects height one over the cap
malformed / truncated input rejects unrecognised bytes
malformed / truncated input rejects a truncated PNG header that sniffs but will not parse
validateImageRef (base64 path) accepts a valid base64 PNG whose bytes match the declared mimeType
validateImageRef (base64 path) rejects a base64 ref whose declared mimeType disagrees with the bytes
validateImageRef (base64 path) rejects a URL ref at this boundary (no inline bytes to inspect)
validateImageRef (base64 path) produces the same verdict for base64 and the equivalent raw bytes
sanitizer seam passes validated bytes through the injected sanitizer
sanitizer seam default passthrough returns the original validated bytes
defaults DEFAULT_IMAGE_LIMITS are sane and used when omitted
createApiKey never stores the plaintext secret in the record
createApiKey produces a unique salt and hash per call for distinct secrets
verifyApiKey round-trip verifies a freshly issued key for its own tenant
verifyApiKey tamper rejection rejects a one-character tamper of the plaintext
verifyApiKey tamper rejection rejects when the stored hash is mutated by one hex char
verifyApiKey tamper rejection fails closed on a malformed (empty) record
verifyApiKey tamper rejection fails closed when the stored hash is not valid hex (undecodable)
verifyApiKey tenant isolation denies a valid secret presented for the wrong tenant
verifyApiKey scope enforcement allows when all required scopes are granted
verifyApiKey scope enforcement denies when a required scope is missing (least privilege)
verifyApiKey expiry (injected clock) allows one millisecond before expiry
verifyApiKey expiry (injected clock) denies exactly at expiry (inclusive cutoff)
verifyApiKey expiry (injected clock) denies one millisecond after expiry
verifyApiKey expiry (injected clock) fails closed when expiresAt is unparseable
verifyApiKey property: only the genuine secret verifies rejects every secret that is not the issued plaintext
sniffFormat rejects buffers that match no format (kills whole-condition -> true) a 12-byte all-zero buffer is not any image format
sniffFormat rejects buffers that match no format (kills whole-condition -> true) a JPEG-magic buffer is not mistaken for PNG or WebP, and vice-versa
JPEG reader bounds and null-arms (kills readU16BE off+N and width/height===null) returns null when the width uint16 read runs one byte past the buffer
JPEG reader bounds and null-arms (kills readU16BE off+N and width/height===null) returns null when the height uint16 read runs one byte past the buffer
JPEG reader bounds and null-arms (kills readU16BE off+N and width/height===null) returns null when the segment-length read itself is out of bounds
JPEG reader bounds and null-arms (kills readU16BE off+N and width/height===null) treats 0x01 (TEM) and 0xD0 (RST0, bottom of range) as standalone markers
JPEG reader bounds and null-arms (kills readU16BE off+N and width/height===null) rejects a JPEG whose declared segment length is exactly 2 minus one (boundary of < 2)
WebP VP8X reader bounds and fourcc disambiguation parses a full VP8X header
WebP VP8X reader bounds and fourcc disambiguation returns null when the VP8X height uint24 read runs past the buffer
WebP VP8X reader bounds and fourcc disambiguation returns null when the VP8X width uint24 read runs past the buffer
WebP VP8X reader bounds and fourcc disambiguation the 15th fourcc byte alone distinguishes VP8X (0x58) from VP8L (0x4c)
per-shopper boundary allows exactly N then denies the N+1th in the same window
per-shopper boundary refills after the window fully advances (injected clock)
per-shopper boundary does not refill one millisecond before the window closes
per-tenant aggregate cap (threat D2) denies a second shopper once the tenant cap is hit even with per-shopper headroom
per-tenant aggregate cap (threat D2) does not record a denied request against either bucket
tenant independence one tenant hitting its cap does not affect another tenant
fail-closed sizing denies all traffic when a cap is zero or negative
property: never allows more than the cap in any window the number of allowed requests within one window never exceeds min(caps)
KDF known-answer vector (kills salt-encoding and scrypt-param mutants) verifies the genuine plaintext against the precomputed scrypt hash
KDF known-answer vector (kills salt-encoding and scrypt-param mutants) rejects a near-miss plaintext against the same fixed vector
malformed-record typeof guards (kills the false-ing of the typeof arms) refuses a record whose salt is an array, not a string (reason stays malformed)
malformed-record typeof guards (kills the false-ing of the typeof arms) refuses a record whose hash is an array, not a string (reason stays malformed)
malformed-record typeof guards (kills the false-ing of the typeof arms) refuses a Buffer plaintext even when it would derive the genuine hash
createApiKey expiry-spread path (kills the L118 conditional) omits expiresAt entirely when none is supplied
createApiKey expiry-spread path (kills the L118 conditional) includes expiresAt verbatim when supplied
append-only interface shape exposes no update or delete method on the interface
immutability and ordering preserves append order across multiple events
immutability and ordering does not let a caller mutate the recorded trail via the returned list
redaction of secret/PII-shaped fields blanks each secret-shaped key while preserving non-secret keys
redaction of secret/PII-shaped fields redacts case-insensitively and inside nested objects and arrays
redaction of secret/PII-shaped fields does not mutate the input object
redaction of secret/PII-shaped fields leaves primitives and null unchanged
redaction of secret/PII-shaped fields redacts before schema validation in redactAndValidateAuditEvent
schema-invalid events refused (fail-closed) throws when a required field is missing
schema-invalid events refused (fail-closed) throws when outcome is not in the allowed enum
schema-invalid events refused (fail-closed) throws on a completely non-object input
